pages.text:
Lupin Digital Health is a wholly owned subsidiary of Lupin Limited.
Lupin Digital Health brings together the best and the brightest from the
healthcare, technology, and operations domains. With our expertise, we
complement cardiologists in ensuring the best possible care for patients.
Lupin Digital Health was founded in 2021 to make cardiac rehabilitation
more accessible and to drive better outcomes for patients using technology.

pages.title: JD_Patient Counsellor.pdf
pages.text:
What we do
Our mission is to harness the power of technology to predict and prevent heart attacks.
We’ve built a digital clinic that combines human intervention by clinicians with
technology, thereby enabling easy monitoring and improving adherence to treatment—
resulting in better patient outcomes.
About the parent company
Lupin Digital Health is a fully owned subsidiary of Lupin. Lupin was founded in 1968 by
visionary Dr. Desh Bandhu Gupta. Lupin is a global pharmaceutical company committed
to innovation, accessibility, and impact.
Lupin develops and commercializes a wide range of branded and generic formulations,
biotechnology products, and APIs in over 100 markets—including the U.S., India, South
Africa, and across the Asia-Paciﬁc, Latin America, Europe, and Middle East regions. It is
the third-largest pharmaceutical company in the U.S. by prescriptions.
Leading the way in digital cardiac rehabilitation
Our digital cardiac rehabilitation program has been built in collaboration with top
cardiologists from India.
Click here to know about our ﬂagship product LYFE

pages.title: JD_Patient Counsellor.pdf
pages.text:
JOB DESCRIPTION
Function: Sales
Role: Patient Counsellor Experience: 1 -3 Years
Reporting To: Area Sales Manager/
 Regional Sales Manager
Patient facing or health care product exposure
Ability to counsel, convince and sell
Well versed with basic English and local language
Willingness to travel by bike or local conveyance
Educational background of BSc Nursing, Food Science &
Nutrition, Social Work, Psychology is preferred
Stationed at a set of pre-deﬁned doctors' clinics or centers/hospitals
Bridging patient concerns and counselling them with LDH’s LYFE program solution
Selling the program to patients in OPD/Wards/IPD and onboarding them to the
LYFE program
Booking slots for demonstration and visiting patients as per slots
Providing timely updates to doctors about their patients’ information after
demonstrations
Coordinating with doctors regarding patient camps and sessions
Key Responsibilities:
What we’re looking for:
Someone who can challenge conventional thinking. Someone who’s willing to roll-up
their sleeves and drive results.
